OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.title: Hoshino Ruby
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.description: A girl overflowing with passion and idol charisma. She always shines with confidence on stage, yet she is constantly searching the crowd for someone. No one knows why she is so fixated on the audience.
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.banter.alive.end: I have to become an idol. Mom used to shine that brightly too...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.banter.dead.endT: I'm sorry, Doctor. I still couldn't find you...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.cardsModifierDes: Ruby cards can now appear in rewards and shops.
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.eventDeathPreven: Doctor, Mom... I'm coming to see you...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.goldMonologue: [sine]This gold... it might come in handy...[/sine]
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_RUBY.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.title: Hoshino Aqua
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.description: A boy with a maturity far beyond his age. He normally appears calm and composed. He entered the entertainment industry in search of someone, but no one knows his true objective.
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.banter.alive.end: I will avenge Ai, no matter what. I'll tear that person apart...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.banter.dead.endT: I'm sorry, Sarina... Ai... I'm coming to join you...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.cardsModifierDes: Aqua cards can now appear in rewards and shops.
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.eventDeathPreven: Doctor, Mom... I'm coming to see you...
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.goldMonologue: [sine]This gold... it might come in handy...[/sine]
OSHINOKO_CHARACTER_AQUA.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
